title: Ulteam Modpack
description: A modpack, some friends and great memories.
body:
## Whaaaat ?
4 years after its first season, the "Ultime Survie" is back for a 4th edition, but this time with a modpack wisely prepared for the occasion, a **new name**: Ulteam SMP, a **new image** and **a server** ! We hope that many players will be part of this adventure.

> **You can know start your own journey by joining the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/kUhFkKZ) server.**

## A problem ?
### For any issues, go on the support channel on Discord or click on "_Report issues_".
